steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice emphasizes the order in which the two lighthouse keepers began their careers. The notes show Moore started in 1817 and Hecox started in 1883. The correct choice must make that chronological sequence explicit.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: addresses when their careers ended, not when they began. ✗
  • Choice B — Hecox began 'years after' Moore: directly establishes the start sequence using the data (Moore 1817, Hecox 1883), making clear who came first. ✓
  • Choice C: incorrectly places Hecox in Connecticut during 1817–1878, which misreads the notes. ✗
  • Choice D: makes a general statement about lighthouse keepers' importance without addressing when either career started. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
